holdings.infoBox: BAMD is an equity ETF with a total of 98 individual holdings. The top holdings are Paychex stock at 5.09%, Blackstone at 5.07%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 5.02%, Edison International at 4.70%, and ONEOK at 4.65%.

overview.description: The Brookstone Dividend Stock ETF (BAMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects income-producing US stocks or ETFs based on external and internal research. It selects both mid- to large-cap securities. BAMD was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by Brookstone.
